triggers.name: cycle_validations_v2_no_delete
triggers.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER cycle_validations_v2_no_delete BEFORE DELETE ON cycle_validations_v2
        BEGIN SELECT RAISE(ABORT,'append-only ledger: DELETE forbidden'); END

triggers.name: cycle_validations_v2_no_update
triggers.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER cycle_validations_v2_no_update BEFORE UPDATE ON cycle_validations_v2
        BEGIN SELECT RAISE(ABORT,'append-only ledger: UPDATE forbidden'); END
